---
title: "Prime Geospatial"
subtitle: "Data Collection, Processing, & Spatial Consulting"
---

Welcome to Prime Geospatial. After 8 years of dormancy, we are back to solve your most complex spatiotemporal and environmental data challenges. We specialize in reproducible workflows, data cleaning, and custom spatial analytics.

## Interactive Proof of Concept

Below is a live demonstration of our web-mapping deployment pipelines, rendered directly from spatial data attributes.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(leaflet)

# Quick demonstration interactive map
leaflet() %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) %>%
  setView(lng = -72.25, lat = 41.80, zoom = 12) %>% 
  addPopups(-72.25, 41.80, "Prime Geospatial Operations Base")
```
